overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V depicting a nighttime drive through an affluent suburban neighborhood. The camera moves from a street corner along palm-lined roads with walled properties, following traffic and approaching an intersection with a tennis court facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street corner with walled properties

events.description: turns right from sidewalk onto the residential street
passes the initial corner stop sign and enters the palm-lined boulevard

agents.ego_description: navigating from the street corner onto the residential road, passing walled estates

entered.detail: white octagonal stop sign with red lettering at the starting corner
tall black iron street lamp with warm yellow glow
high boundary wall with smooth cream-colored stucco finish
two-story residence with shuttered windows and illuminated interior lights
row of tall palm trees lining the street against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a residential street corner marked by a stop sign and ornate street lamp. The camera turns right onto a palm-lined boulevard, passing Mediterranean-style villas with illuminated windows behind cream stucco walls. The street is empty of pedestrians and traffic, illuminated by warm streetlights against the cool night sky.

events.description: black sedan with headlights on passes from the opposite direction
red sedan with illuminated taillights appears ahead and is followed

agents.ego_description: following a red sedan down the residential street at steady speed

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead with brake lights illuminated, maintaining distance

entered.detail: passenger vehicle with glowing red taillights driving in the same direction
yellow painted fire hydrant at the curb edge

segments.scene_description: Driving along the palm-lined boulevard, the camera follows a red sedan ahead. A black car passes in the opposite direction early in the segment. The street continues with cream stucco walls and hedges on the right, and tall palm trees on the left, all illuminated by streetlights.

events.description: large white box truck passes in the opposite direction
tennis court chain-link fence becomes visible on the right side
approaches and stops at the intersection stop sign

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a stop at the intersection stop sign behind the red sedan

notable_agents.action: white box truck with headlights driving in the opposite direction, passing by

entered.detail: large commercial delivery truck with illuminated headlights
tall chain-link fence surrounding illuminated tennis courts
white painted STOP letters on the asphalt surface
red octagonal stop sign at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches an intersection marked by a large tennis court facility with chain-link fencing on the right. A white box truck passes in the opposite direction. The camera slows down behind the red sedan, stopping at the painted stop sign marking on the road and the octagonal stop sign at the intersection corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous nighttime drive through an affluent suburban neighborhood that transitions from a quiet residential corner to a busy intersection. It begins at a street corner marked by a stop sign and ornate lamp, turning right onto a boulevard lined with Mediterranean-style villas and illuminated cream stucco walls. As the camera moves forward, it follows a red sedan past tall palm trees and hedges, briefly crossing paths with a black car traveling in the opposite direction. The scene then opens up toward a larger intersection, passing a chain-link fenced tennis court facility while a white box truck drives past. Finally, the camera slows to a halt behind the red sedan at the painted stop line and the octagonal sign marking the end of the road.
